title: We've detected a Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention issue in your environment
impact: If action isn't taken, you may continue to see an error banner in Microsoft Edge for Business.

updates.content:
Title: We've detected a Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention issue in your environment

User impact: If action isn't taken, you may continue to see an error banner in Microsoft Edge for Business. 

Current Status:  We’ve identified through error monitoring activities that the “Action required for browser protections” banner in the Microsoft Purview portal can appear even when your collection and DLP policies for unmanaged apps in Edge for Business are functioning correctly. 
This occurs when the signed-in administrator does not hold one of the Microsoft Entra roles required to read and confirm policy activation state. In this situation the banner is a false positive — your policies in Edge for Business may be active and enforcing as expected. For more information on this feature and roles required to fully activate the Purview policy in Edge for Business, please see: Activate your DLP policy in Microsoft Edge | Microsoft Learn 
Please review the recommendations to determine whether any action is needed and to prevent unnecessary changes to working policies. 

This communication will expire in 14 days, and is scheduled to remain active for the full duration.
